title: Bell bell_star_dlx_mips_gloss-black

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with MIPS Technology

technical_analysis: The Bell Star DLX integrates the Multi-directional Impact Protection System (MIPS) to mitigate rotational forces during oblique impacts, a critical advancement over traditional linear protection shells. Constructed from a high-grade carbon fiber composite, the helmet achieves an exceptional strength-to-weight ratio, reducing overall mass by approximately 15% compared to standard fiberglass models while maintaining superior impact dispersion capabilities. The internal liner utilizes advanced EPS foam density mapping tailored specifically for the Intermediate Oval head shape, ensuring optimal energy absorption across the frontal and temporal regions without compromising comfort during extended rides.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of cutting-edge safety and sleek aesthetics with the Bell Star DLX in Gloss Black. This full-face helmet is engineered for riders who demand uncompromising protection without sacrificing style, featuring a glossy finish that commands attention on the track or street. Equipped with MIPS technology, it offers peace of mind by reducing rotational forces in crashes, making it an ideal choice for both aggressive sport riding and spirited touring.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Bell Star DLX MIPS helmet in gloss black. Features carbon fiber construction, DOT/ECE certification, and superior ventilation for maximum safety and style.
